fight.title: Fight Response
fight.desc: Under pressure, you take control. You push harder, get louder, and channel stress into action — sometimes too much.
fight.advice: Your drive is incredible. Learn to pause before reacting — not every stress needs a battle.

flight.title: Flight Response
flight.desc: When things get heavy, you escape. Physically, mentally, digitally — you find a way out before the walls close in.
flight.advice: Leaving is sometimes wisdom. But notice when you're running from growth, not danger.

fawn.title: Fawn Response
fawn.desc: You survive by pleasing. You read rooms, adjust yourself, and prioritize others' comfort over your own truth.
fawn.advice: Your kindness is real. Start asking: "Am I being kind, or am I being safe?" They're not always the same.

freeze.title: Freeze Response
freeze.desc: Overwhelm makes you still. You go quiet, numb, and wait for the storm to pass — often from the inside.
freeze.advice: Stillness can be wisdom. But practice small movements when frozen — one action can break the spell.
